title: Delhi High Court grants interim bail to Baramulla MP Engineer Rashid to visit his ailing father
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday granted an interim bail of one week to Baramulla MP Abdul Rashid Sheikh alias Engineer Rashid to enable him meet his ailing father who is on ventilator support in Srinagar. A Division Bench of Justices Prathiba M Singh and Madhu Jain said that Rashid shall remain at his residence or at the hospital, where his father is receiving treatment, during the period of bail.
